title: Go | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# Go

## [Supported versions](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/go/#supported-versions "Supported versions")

The level of support for a language is defined as follows:

- Fully supported: Analysis will complete. All the language features are understood and examined.
- Supported: Most language features are understood and examined but the version includes unsupported features. Analysis might break or provide incomplete results.

Versions 1.0 to 1.23 are supported.

## [Prerequisites](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/go/#prerequisites "Prerequisites")

- SonarScanner should run on a x86-64 Windows, macOS or Linux 64bits machine.
- You need the [Go](https://golang.org/ "Go") installation on the scan machine only if you want to import coverage data.

## [Language-specific properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/go/#language-specific-properties "Language-specific properties")

You can discover and update the Go-specific [properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/analysis-parameters/ "properties") in the project **Administration** > **General Settings** > **Languages** > **Go**

By default, all the `vendor` directories are excluded from the analysis. However, you can change the property `sonar.go.exclusions` to a different pattern if you want to force their analysis (not recommended).

## [sonar-project.properties Sample](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/go/#sonarprojectproperties-sample "sonar-project.properties Sample")

Here is a first version of a `sonar-project.properties` file, valid for a simple `Go` project:

  `sonar.projectKey=com.company.projectkey1   sonar.projectName=My Project Name    sonar.sources=.   sonar.exclusions=**/*_test.go    sonar.tests=.   sonar.test.inclusions=**/*_test.go`

## [Related pages](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/go/#related-pages "Related pages")

- [Test coverage](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/enriching/test-coverage/overview/ "Test coverage ")
- [Importing External Issues](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/enriching/external-analyzer-reports/ "Importing External Issues ") (GoVet, GoLint, GoMetaLinter)
